name: Login Bypass
description: A corporate portal with a vulnerable login form. Bypass authentication using a classic SQL injection to retrieve the flag.
briefing: You've discovered an internal employee portal for Nexus Corp during a penetration test. The login page appears to use a backend database for authentication. Your goal is to bypass the login form and access the admin dashboard, where a confidential flag is stored. The developers appear to have taken no precautions against SQL injection.
objective: Bypass the login form using SQL injection to access the admin dashboard and retrieve the flag.
author: h4ck0rman
